_doc: Vibe-Appliance per-app manifest. Schema: https://github.com/KisaesDevLab/Vibe-Appliance/blob/main/console/manifest.schema.json. Worked example: console/manifests/vibe-tb.json. Allocations cross-checked against Vibe-Appliance/docs/addenda/emergency-access.md §3 Port assignments at the time of authoring (Phase 01).
description: TValue-grade time-value-of-money calculations and a tax-advisory calculator suite for CPA firms.

optional.name: VIBE_KMS_KEY
optional.doc: AES-256-GCM key (32 bytes, base64) used to encrypt the per-firm Anthropic API key at rest. Phase 23 wires this; safe to leave unset until then.

optional.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
optional.doc: Claude API key for Phase 23 loan-agreement extraction. Inherited from appliance.env unless overridden per-app.

ui.label: Anthropic API key
ui.helpText: Powers AI-assisted loan-agreement extraction (Phase 23). The same key is used appliance-wide unless overridden per-app.
